name: Mini Morsel Granola Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Nestle Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and brown sugar until creamy.
4. Beat in eggs. Gradually beat in flour mixture.
5. Stir in Nestle Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels, granola, and raisins.
6. Drop by rounded measuring tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake 9-11 minutes until edges are golden brown. Let stand on cookie sheets for 5 minutes. Remove from cookie sheets; cool.
Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
